feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 113,622Chapters: 22/30Kudos: 681

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: two thousand years and twenty more
entry.summary:
Author: A_Lady_of_Night

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,310Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 12

Summary: When the mysterious disappearances of Greek artefacts from The Gotham Museum might spread to The Metropolis Museum of Art and History as well, Bruce and Clark plan to investigate at the new exhibit opening the next day. Unfortunately, their plans get derailed and stopping a possible small-time burglary expedition spirals into disaster. Or: Superman loses his powers and gets turned into a merman. No one is happy about this.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: What it takes to fall in love
entry.summary:
Author: Error404FileNotFound

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 444Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: A slowburn between Batman and Superman. This writer knows the DC universe but is going rogue and will not be researching. This is based off (slightly) Rob Pattison Batman (2022) and the David Corenswett Superman (2025). Also a bunch of cartoons I found on pintrest that were very gay. I'm also very sorry but english is my first langauge and nothing bad is currently happening in my life so it won't be as peak. 19-year old Batman adopts young Dick Grayson and both struggle to learn to be part of each others life. Superman is dealing with a growing crush on Lex Luthor, but Lex may have ulterior motives. Both are little shits that are falling in love and don't realise it. (My grammer is lowk shit, but who freaking cares you chose to look for gay superman batman stuff, what did you expect?)

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Don't Look Back
entry.summary:
Author: lovelytime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,581Chapters: 9/20Kudos: 76

Summary: Clark had died, and the world kept spinning. He wasn't quite sure where he fit now that he was back, but he knew better than to look back. Unfortunately, old habits die hard.

entry.title: Skybound
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,248Chapters: 8/15Kudos: 31

Summary: In a world where wings decide your place in society, a deadly disease is spreading through the population. Bruce and Clark are on the case, searching for the culprit as well as the cure.

entry.title: It’s brutal out here!
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,589Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 393

Summary: When Bruce’s silence gestured for him to go on, Clark chuckled slightly, fiddling with the sleeve of his shirt. “You know what I mean. Everyone had a grungy era of their childhood. Mine was just a little more . . . intense than others. I was more rebellious than troublesome, honestly.” Or Clark gets de-aged to seventeen a.k.a when he had his punk rock phase, and everyone is forced to bare witness

entry.title: red, white & boy scout blue
entry.summary:
Author: mitsukiris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,991Chapters: 13/13Kudos: 237

Summary: 'Bruce chuckles, no ounce of amusement in it, “I believe perhaps you should consider switching to water, Kent.” “Should I?” Clark asks, batting his eyelashes at Bruce. “Why? Am I offending you? Sorry I’m not obsessed with you like everyone else. I know that must be confusing for you.” “You know what?” Bruce eyes him up and down. “I think you are.” Clark is frozen. He can’t move. He blinks a few times, slowly trying to digest the words. He can’t. And Bruce? Well, Bruce’s polite smile turns smug and almost a little mean.' or: Pulitzer winning journalist Clark Kent and playboy Bruce Wayne have to pretend to be friends after one sweet incident. What will happen when this fake friendship turns into a real one? What will happen when it turns into something more?

entry.title: HAIL MARY
entry.summary:
Author: sleepyteatimebear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,295Chapters: 16/32Kudos: 152

Summary: Clark 'Superman' Kent, is a shoe-in for the NFL draft, a tall, dimpled, All-American-Type, College Football's Jesus. Bruce is well-known for his intense dedication to collegiate journalism, his all-black closet and the billions promised to him upon graduation. Bruce wants to sweep at the Collegiate Emmy's, Clark wants to go pro. So, they make a deal. Bruce can produce a media campaign that rallies the public behind Clark before Draft Day. Bruce helps to upkeep the Wayne Media Enterprise legacy, and Clark gets good press. But then, Clark and Bruce spend game-day after game-day together. Bruce asks Clark questions, studies him, captures him, writes all of him down. What's even more peculiar is Clark starts asking questions back. Questions that make Bruce feel like Clark wants to know him as more than just his shadow for the season. They can’t fall in love. It wouldn’t make practical sense. It wouldn’t make emotional sense. But couldn't it?

entry.title: The Curse of Lady Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: NeptonicMistakes

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,178Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 26

Summary: Gotham has a cryptid that has been roaming its streets, protecting its city, for nearly 200 years. Jimmy wants to solve the mystery of who this cryptid is and drags Clark with him. What happens with Clark discovers things about it that no one has ever. What happens when he realizes there is something hidden but human about it? ---- This is gonna be another long fic! One that will even be Multi-Media (with fanart, mock articles and journal entries)! There might be smut at some point (sep chapter from the rest and marked, able to skip it and not miss major plot)!

entry.title: Shadow and Sun
entry.summary:
Author: Katylark

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 127,881Chapters: 12/25Kudos: 19

Summary: When Darkseid’s invasion forces Earth’s heroes to unite, an unknown alien changes the course of the battle—and the world names him Superman. Eighteen months later, Superman is beloved across the globe, distrusted by Batman, and lonelier than anyone knows. Clark Kent has lost both of his parents, built a Fortress in the Arctic, and is quietly coming undone under the weight of grief, secrecy, and the strange Kryptonian bonds that once made his family feel like home. Then he meets Bruce Wayne. What begins across the waters between Metropolis and Gotham as an unexpected romance becomes something deeper, more dangerous, and far more fragile than either of them is prepared for—especially when Clark’s last surviving family falls from the stars, Lex Luthor starts asking all the right questions, and Bruce mistakes the truth for betrayal. A story about first trust, second chances, alien invasions, black sites, the family you lose, and the family you choose.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:
Author: DARK_FIREFOX

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 40Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: As an explosion in Tony's lab sends Peter into Gotham where he dies moments later, due to falling 30 feet out of the sky, Peter is then found by the Joker and is revived only to become one of the Joker's many experiments.

entry.title: Until the sun turns red
entry.summary:
Author: g0j0_Kat

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,225Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: “I will love you, for as long as I live, until the sun turns red, until I become human, vulnerable, until I draw my last breath. And even then I will still love you” “Do you, Clark Kent, Kal-El, Last son of Krypton, take Bruce Wayne, Batman as your Husband?” “I do”

entry.title: Batman learns to rest
entry.summary:
Author: Raccoon_queen

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 609Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: Clark learns that loving Bruce Wayne is not quiet, not easy, and definitely not well-timed. It happens at 5 AM in a half-lit Gotham apartment, somewhere between bruises healing too slowly and a man who insists he’s “rested” while standing asleep in a kitchen. Clark thinks maybe... just maybe... Bruce Wayne doesn’t actually know what rest feels like. So he decides to show him.

entry.title: Dog Days
entry.summary:
Author: fawnlvr

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,322Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 16

Summary: Clark Kent has always been a good dog. He loves his Ma and Pa, his friends Lois, Jimmy, and Cat, and he finally received his official collar! Life in Metropolis is perfect.Then one night, everything changes.Taken far from home and thrown into the dangerous streets of Gotham, Clark suddenly finds himself alone with no way back to the family waiting for him. The only dog willing to help is Bruce, a grumpy stray with sharp teeth, many scars, extremely rude I may add, and a habit of pretending he doesn’t care about anybody.Bruce knows the streets of Gotham better than anyone. Getting home should be simple, right? Or Lady And The Tramp AU

entry.title: Summerboy
entry.summary:
Author: miuwk4t

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,913Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 46

Summary: “Come on, just the two of us,” Clark insisted, he bent his knees to launch them both somewhere better after Bruce replied with a quiet grumble.But then he felt a familiar rough tug at his ankle, Bruce felt it too. Both men looked down, only to find Damian standing directly beneath them, tugging at Clark’s ankle. One hand firmly wrapped around it.The expression on his face looked visibly annoyed, his sunglasses were slightly crooked and his wet hair stuck to his forehead. The three of them stared at each other, then Damian tightened his grip.“Hey.. buddy?” -Or Damian decides to bother Clark by disturbing the world’s finest’s date together.

entry.title: the windows to the soul
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,226Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 70

Summary: After living for millenia, there's nothing anymore that drives Kal-el. His mountain overflows with treasures accumulated over lifetimes, and his city is thriving under his protection. He believes that he has everything, that nothing will stir his ancient heart. Until he meets Bruce Wayne, that is. --- Bruce, on the other hand, is sacrificed to the great dragon to save the dying city of Gotham. Now, he must learn to appease the dragon, to save himself, at the very least.

entry.title: Cage of Roses
entry.summary:
Author: endofer

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,741Chapters: 3/14Kudos: 41

Summary: The story Clark had heard wasn't entirely clear and previous monster hunters who'd come investigating had been sent packing, unwilling to talk about it. Some details remained the same between retellings: there was a monstrous creature in this town, it punished crime and protected the town from invasion, and it occasionally asked for a human sacrifice.In a castle overlooking a town lives a monstrous bat creature. It is the town’s protector and a source of fear. Clark Kent hears about these rumours and comes to investigate. A retelling Beauty and the Beast with MonsterHunter!Clark and Beast!Bruce ft. Alfred and a handful of batkids.

entry.title: Coming Home to you
entry.summary:
Author: g0j0_Kat

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,651Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: Domestic Superbat with a sprinkle of angst “I never understood the meaning of life until I met you, Clark,” he whispered. "I'm glad it was you, Clark.” “I'm really glad.”

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part Three
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 108,778Chapters: 8/15Kudos: 8

Summary: The Silax treatment is ready, but the cure is no simple rescue. To silence the queen inside him, Aven must let the inhibitor fail, wake the thing Weyland-Yutani built him to carry, and trust Bruce, Clark, Amanda, his brothers, and the children he left behind to keep him alive through the worst of it. For the first time, everyone is in the same room. Secrets come out. Old wounds split open. Family stops being something Aven can protect from a distance and becomes the only reason he can face what comes next. But beyond the Fortress, LexCorp’s stolen files reveal that Weyland’s work has not stopped with Aven. The procedure may end one nightmare. It may also uncover the next. (God, I really suck at summaries lmao)
